data.reason: The text explicitly states that Section 6.6 and the definition of Permitted Addbacks were amended by Amendment No. 1, dated April 30, 2013, and that any determination for a fiscal quarter ending on or after April 30, 2013 gives effect to that amendment. This indicates the amendment is referenced and applied, not merely referenced but not yet applied.
